schema.description: Schema for custom metadata containing metadata key definitions

items.description: The definition for a key within a Custom Metadata schema. Only the fields applicable to Custom Metadata are exposed.

name.description: The name of the metadata key.

propertyType.description: The type of metadata key. This governs the search and faceting behavior.

skipIndexing.description: If true then the property will not be indexed for retrieval and ranking.

items.title: CustomMetadataPropertyDefinition

schema.title: CustomMetadataSchema
